title: Looking for your next app idea?

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Are you looking for your next app idea?

Check out the all new Ideas page in our site!

You will find great information about who our monday users (and your future customers) are, what pain points we see, common use cases and most used tools.

We even have a board full of awesome ideas for apps! You’ll find some app ideas that come from customer feedback.

Take an idea and develop it to make it your own or use it as an example of how good ideas can look!
